sections.paragraph:
ἀκαταστασία, ας, ἡ (opp. κατάστασις q.v., cp. στάσις and DELG on the latter; Polyb. 7, 4, 8; 14, 9, 6; Diog. L. 7, 110; Epict. 3, 19, 3; Vett. Val. index; PGrenf I, 1, 4 [173 b.c.]; Astrol. Pap. I fr. Munich: APF 1, 1901, 494, 26; Tob 4:13; Pr 26:28; ApcMos 24).

① unsettled state of affairs, disturbance, tumult (schol. on Apollon. Rhod. 1, 916, 18b) Hs 6, 3, 4. Pl. (Dionys. Hal. 6, 31) 2 Cor 6:5 prob. of mob action; 2 Cl 11:4 (quot. of unknown orig.).

② opposition to established authority, disorder, unruliness (Nicol. Dam.: 90 Fgm. 130, 110 p. 413, 27 Jac. ἐν ἀ. πραγμάτων; Cat. Cod. Astr. VIII/3, 182, 8; 187, 2) 1 Cl 14:1 (w. ἀλαζονεία); cp. 3:2; 43:6; (w. φαῦλον πρᾶγμα) Js 3:16; (opp. εἰρήνη) 1 Cor 14:33 (EKäsemann, NTS 1, ’54/55, 248–60). Pl. (Cat. Cod. Astr. VII 126, 13; VIII/3, 175, 9) 2 Cor 12:20; (w. πόλεμος) insurrections (PCairMasp 4, 6) Lk 21:9.—Boll 130f. M-M. TW.

opp. opp. = opposed to, opposite

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Diog. L. Diog. L. = Diogenes Laertius, III a.d.—List 5

Epict Epict , various works, I–II a.d.—List 5

PGrenf I PGrenf I = BGrenfell, An Alexandrian Erotic Fragment, etc.—List 4

  1. fr. = from

APF APF = Archiv für Papyrusforschung—Lists 4, 6

ApcMos ApcMos = Apocalypse of Moses—List 2

schol. schol. = scholion, scholia, scholiast

Hs Hs = Similitudes

prob. prob. = probable, probably

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

quot. quot. = quotation

orig. orig. = original(ly)

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

NTS NTS = New Testament Studies—List 6

PCairMasp PCairMasp = JMaspero, Papyrus grecs d’époque byzantine—List 4

Boll Boll = FB., Aus der Offenb. Johannis—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 35
